aboutpara: I'm Mia Gayapersad from Trinidad, a digital artist and tech enthusiast. I blend creativity with technology to create artwork, web projects, and interactive experiences. My work is driven by curiosity, exploration, and the desire to bring ideas to life.

resume.description: I explore the intersection of creativity and technology through digital art and web projects.

education.universityPara: Currently pursuing a Computer Science degree, focusing on creative technologies, web development, and digital media.
